Prelaunch Content 1:
The Opportunity
Module 4
Your Prelaunch Content…
• Your launch does not have to be video based
• These days most are (either direct-to-camera or
screencapture)
• They can be blog posts, emails, podcasts, etc.
• In general I use the term video but it doesn’t have
to be video
Prelaunch Content 1 (PLC 1)…
• It’s about the opportunity
• This is the journey – where you’re showing your
avatar the opportunity to change their life for the
better
• Increase their pleasure or eliminate their pain
• The journey they go through to change their life
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Prelaunch Content 1 (PLC 1)…
The Three PLC’s…
• PLC 1 = the Why
• PLC 2 = the What
• PLC 3 = the How To
Your Prelaunch Sequence and Avatar
• It’s really important to understand who your
avatar is…
• What are their pain points and desires?
• What are the dangers and big opportunities?
• What do they really want – what are their hot
points?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
A big part of this story is…
• How you found the solution you’re about to share
• How you were able to eliminate those frustrations
or achieve those desires
• Why have you decided to share it?
• There’s a chance your story might not be your
avatar’s story
• You can tell the story of your clients (their
successes and transformations)
Overview or PLC 1
• It’s about the why…
• Why should they care?
• Why should they spend their time paying
attention to you?
• (Because of the opportunity to change their life)
• You have to show that outcome – where that
journey would take them
The Framework of PLC 1
• Show the opportunity
• The before and after
• Show and tell how their life is going to change
• Positioning – why should they listen to you
• Teach – you have to deliver value
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
The Framework of PLC 1
• Raise and answer objections
• You need to talk about them
• There’s always going to 2-3 really big ones and
a few smaller ones
• You need to answer the top 2-3 (and continue
to talk about them)
• Foreshadow what’s in PLC 2
• End with a call to action
Example Script for PLC 1
• I’m a lot like you…
• This is where I was…
• This is what I aspired to be…
• This is how I discovered the answer…
• Here are a couple secrets I learned…
When I started out …
• I didn’t know how to sell…
• I hated selling…
• This process worked really well and kept doing it
over and over again…
• (This is part of my story – and it’s true – and many
people can relate to this story)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
What to Avoid…
• Avoid mentioning your product or that you are
going to be making an offer
• Not a hard and fast rule
• Avoid making your videos too long
• Avoid having any other links or distractions on
your Prelaunch pages
PLC 1 is Super Important…
• I spend as much time on PLC 1 as I do on PLC 2
and PLC 3 combined
• It sets the tone for your entire launch
• Make sure to nail PLC 1
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
